overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit futuristic control room. The environment features industrial metal architecture with green and red ambient lighting from numerous computer terminals and data screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic control room corridor with data terminals

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor examining the data terminals on the right wall

entered.detail: wall of green-lit data screens displaying status information
standalone computer terminal with multiple monitors
exposed metal ceiling panels with overhead lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow corridor section of the control room, passing a wall of green data screens on the right and approaching a central console terminal. The environment is dimly lit with artificial green ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: central command area with tactical display

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from green to mixed red tones as character passes emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: moving toward the large tactical display screen at the center of the command room

entered.detail: large screen displaying geometric tactical diagrams and data
industrial metal conference table with holographic interface
ergonomic office chairs arranged around the central table

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main command area where a large tactical display dominates the far wall. The lighting shifts to include red tones from emergency lights as the character passes a central conference table with office chairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: data monitoring station with status screens

events.description: character turns left toward the data monitoring wall
character slows and stops to observe the status screens

agents.ego_description: turning toward the left wall and approaching the data screens, then stopping to observe the displays

entered.detail: wall of vertical data monitors showing system status and code

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks toward a wall of data monitors, passing the conference table which recedes into the background. The character stops near the left wall to observe the status screens, with green lighting becoming dominant again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic control room that shifts from a narrow, green-lit corridor into a larger command center with contrasting emergency lighting. It begins with the character walking past a wall of green data screens toward a central console terminal under dim artificial light. As the character enters the main command area, the scene expands to reveal a large tactical display and a central conference table, while the lighting shifts to include red tones from emergency lights. The camera then turns left, leaving the conference table behind to approach a wall of data monitors. Finally, the character stops near the left wall to observe the status screens as the dominant green lighting returns.
